metadata.title: SETAGRO — Anhydrous ammonia application
metadata.description: SETAGRO provides anhydrous ammonia application as a nitrogen fertilizer on fields in Ukraine, Romania, Bulgaria, and Moldova.

footer.tagline: Professional solutions for agribusiness: from logistics to high-precision fertilizer application.

hero.description: We help you get the most from every harvest with precise equipment and years of experience in agrochemistry.

about.title: About the company
about.p1: Our company has many years of experience in agriculture. We offer a full range of services covering procurement, storage, transport, and application of <fertilizer>anhydrous ammonia</fertilizer> as a nitrogen fertilizer.
about.p2: We operate in Ukraine, Romania, Bulgaria, and Moldova, ensuring timely, high-precision application with best-in-class specialized equipment.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.subtitle: See how our machinery performs and the results we achieve through precise fertilizer application.

hero.title: APPLICATION OF
hero.subtitle: Chemical formula: NH3 | Nitrogen mass fraction: 82.3%

adv1.title: 82.3% nitrogen
adv1.text: The highest concentration of active ingredient available.

adv2.title: Extended release
adv2.text: Becomes available gradually after nitrification by bacteria.

adv3.title: Ammonium form
adv3.text: High uptake efficiency directly through the roots.

adv4.title: Stability
adv4.text: The fertilizer is not washed away by rain and does not volatilize.

chart.title: Nitrogen content comparison
chart.text: Anhydrous ammonia leads all common mineral fertilizers in nitrogen content. That makes it the most cost-effective option per unit of active ingredient.
chart.chartAlt: Chart comparing nitrogen content in fertilizers

spring.title: Start of sowing season
spring.text: Sowing is possible as soon as two days after application.

autumn.title: Process optimization
autumn.text: Reduced load on machinery before spring field work.

professional.title: Professional approach
professional.text: Anhydrous ammonia requires specialized equipment and expertise. Our specialists ensure accurate placement at the right depth for maximum efficiency without losses.

hero.title: NEWS
hero.subtitle: Current events, photo reports, and innovations in agrochemistry

items.title: Support for the Air Force
items.content:
FSC Batkivshyna donated two buses to a unit of the Ukrainian Air Force. The vehicles will help the unit meet its logistics needs more effectively.

SETAGRO also joined the initiative. Together, the partners not only purchased vehicles but expanded the effort—instead of one bus, four were sourced in Italy and handed over.

The project was made possible by coordinated teamwork and partners who provided funding, organization, and communications.

items.title: Trimble CFX-750 training for SETAGRO in Bila Tserkva
items.content:
A hands-on training on the Trimble CFX-750 system was held in Bila Tserkva for SETAGRO employees to deepen skills and knowledge in modern agricultural technology.

Participants explored system features, configuration, and field use, with emphasis on navigation accuracy and equipment efficiency in agriculture.

Company leadership also attended and stressed the importance of innovation in daily operations and ongoing professional development.

Such training supports higher operational efficiency and the adoption of modern technology across the company.

items.title: The anhydrous ammonia market in Ukraine
items.content:
Ukraine uses roughly 140–160 thousand tonnes of anhydrous ammonia per year, yet the segment remains relatively small due to complex logistics, storage, and application.

The market is closely tied to natural gas prices, which account for up to 90% of ammonia production cost. Lower gas prices tend to boost domestic production and market activity.

Despite the challenges, anhydrous ammonia remains an efficient nitrogen source, and experts expect gradual growth in agricultural use.

items.title: About ammonia
items.content:
Managing partner of Setagro, Mykola Kybuk, told Latifundist that ammonia is the primary feedstock for most nitrogen fertilizers and is produced mainly from natural gas today, while its history spans over 100 years—from coal-based synthesis to use as fertilizer in the United States, including in irrigation systems.

Ammonia (NH3) is not only an effective fertilizer but also a basis for urea, ammonium nitrate, and other nitrogen products. Ammonium water—ammonia dissolved in water—is also widely used.

items.title: Round table with SETAGRO
items.content: On January 20, 2016, a round table brought together representatives of Setagro LLC, scientists from the Institute of Agricultural Microbiology of the NAAS, and partners. Participants discussed microbial products and AZOTER fertilizers, as well as cooperation and innovation in agriculture.

hero.title: PRIVACY
hero.subtitle: We care about your data and your security

s1.title: 1. General provisions
s1.text: This Privacy Policy describes how personal data of visitors to the <site>setagro</site> website (the “Site”) is collected, stored, processed, and used. We respect the confidentiality of everyone who visits our Site.

s2.title: 2. Data we collect
s2.intro: We only collect information you voluntarily provide through contact forms, the careers section, or when you reach out to us:
items: Information contained in your CV (for job applicants).

s3.title: 3. Purposes of processing
s3.intro: Your data is used solely to:
items: Provide consultation on anhydrous ammonia application services;
Improve our Site and service quality;
Send informational messages with your consent.

s4.title: 4. Protection and retention
s4.text: We use current standards to protect information from loss, misuse, or destruction. We retain your data only as long as needed for the purposes for which it was collected, or until you request deletion.

s5.title: 5. Sharing with third parties
s5.text: We <emph>do not sell</emph> or share your personal data with third parties. This does not apply to trusted partners who help us run the Site, provided they agree to keep the information confidential.

s6.title: 6. Your rights
s6.text: You may request access to your personal data at any time, ask us to correct inaccuracies, or request full deletion from our records.
